channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12497] sanity-lfsck test_35: crash in lu_env_remove()
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/bae65a42-9b4f-11e9-b26a-52540065bddc

test_35 failed with the following error:

trevis-38vm3 crashed during sanity-lfsck test_35

12663.615695] general protection fault: 0000 [#1] SMP 
[12663.616709] Modules linked in: dm_flakey osp(OE) ofd(OE) lfsck(OE) ost(OE) mgc(OE) osd_ldiskfs(OE) lquota(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) ldiskfs(OE) libcfs(OE) rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache rpcrdma ib_isert iscsi_target_mod ib_iser libiscsi scsi_transport_iscsi ib_srpt target_core_mod crc_t10dif crct10dif_generic ib_srp scsi_transport_srp scsi_tgt ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_core sunrpc dm_mod ppdev iosf_mbi crc32_pclmul ghash_clmulni_intel aesni_intel lrw gf128mul glue_helper ablk_helper cryptd joydev pcspkr virtio_balloon parport_pc parport i2c_piix4 ip_tables ext4 mbcache jbd2 virtio_blk ata_generic pata_acpi crct10dif_pclmul crct10dif_common crc32c_intel floppy serio_raw 8139too ata_piix libata 8139cp mii virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio [last unloaded: dm_flakey]
[12663.632169] CPU: 1 PID: 32264 Comm: ll_ost00_001 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE  ------------   3.10.0-957.12.2.el7_lustre.x86_64 #1
[12663.634226] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[12663.635184] task: ffff942717094100 ti: ffff94272d0e4000 task.ti: ffff94272d0e4000
[12663.636419] RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffb81801c9>]  [<ffffffffb81801c9>] memcmp+0x9/0x50
[12663.642127]  [<ffffffffc0610ee7>] lu_env_remove+0x147/0x380 [obdclass]
[12663.650257]  [<ffffffffc0dfeb10>] ptlrpc_main+0x5f0/0x1560 [ptlrpc]
[12663.651326]  [<ffffffffb7ed0970>] ? finish_task_switch+0x50/0x1c0
[12663.652439]  [<ffffffffc0dfe520>] ? ptlrpc_register_service+0xfa0/0xfa0 [ptlrpc]
[12663.653727]  [<ffffffffb7ec1d21>] kthread+0xd1/0xe0
[12663.654550]  [<ffffffffb7ec1c50>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40
[12663.655597]  [<ffffffffb8575c37>] ret_from_fork_nospec_begin+0x21/0x21
[12663.656685]  [<ffffffffb7ec1c50>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-lfsck test_35 - trevis-38vm3 crashed during sanity-lfsck test_35

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
